name: Gautraeux Bokor

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Proper Motivation
abilities.text: Once per turn. After resolving a friendly effect that damaged this model, this model may move up to 4" and make a Scheme marker in base contact.

abilities.name: Swamp Lights
abilities.text: This model may remove a Glowy token on it to reduce damage dealt to it by 2.

actions.name: Swamp Spirits
actions.effects: Models within (r)1" of the target are dealt 1 damage. For each raise this action receives, increase the (r) by +2".

triggers.name: Strike, My Pretties...
triggers.text: Once per activation. Select a (melee) action on a friendly model within 6". This model declares the selected action.

triggers.name: That's Normal
triggers.text: The target gains a Glowy token.

actions.name: Swirling Magic
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Place this model within range and give it a Glowy token.

triggers.name: Swamp Wisdom
triggers.text: Friendly models within (r)1" gain an Insight token.

actions.name: Stage Prep
actions.effects: Make a Pyrotechnic marker within range.

triggers.name: Short Fuse
triggers.text: Resolve the end of turn effects on the made marker using a suit in this action's final duel total.

extraction_notes: Model limit is 3, extracted from 'Minion (3)' characteristic
